name: M&A Culture Clash Simulation
description: Pre-deal cultural integration assessment simulating the collision of two organizational cultures during a merger or acquisition. Tests compatibility of decision-making styles, communication norms, and risk appetites.

customization.context: Leading aggressive acquisition to expand market position
Defending company legacy and protecting employee interests
Analyzing synergy targets and integration costs
Assessing cultural fit and talent retention risks
Evaluating strategic rationale and integration roadmap
Managing day-to-day integration execution and timeline

round_structure: Position statements: Each stakeholder articulates their primary concerns and non-negotiables
Cultural values mapping: Identify alignment and friction points between organizational cultures
Synergy pressure-test: CFO challenges revenue and cost synergy assumptions
Retention risk analysis: HR identifies key talent flight risks and mitigation strategies
Integration governance: Define decision rights and escalation protocols
Communication cascade: Plan internal and external messaging strategy
Go/no-go assessment: Final recommendation on deal proceed with conditions
expected_deliverables: Cultural alignment heatmap highlighting friction zones
Integration risk register with mitigation owners
Key talent retention plan with incentives
Decision rights matrix for post-close governance

visibility_rules.private_concerns: Each stakeholder has hidden agenda items revealed in private messages
visibility_rules.public_commitments: All formal positions are visible to all participants

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Priority matrix scoring with CFO veto on budget exceedance
environment_config.escalation_trigger: If cultural conflict score exceeds threshold, mandatory mediation round
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: CEO coalition bonus when both CEOs align; HR-Strategy coalition for talent retention
